title: Explicit heat-equation weights sum to one

source.notes: Generated from checked Lean ground truth; source repository withheld during public release.

informal.statement: For any real diffusion number r, the explicit heat-equation weights r, 1 - 2r, and r sum to one.
assumptions: r is a real diffusion number
informal.expected_conclusion: The three scalar heat-equation update weights sum to one.

declarations.name: heatWeights_sum
declarations.statement: theorem heatWeights_sum (r : Real) : heatLeftWeight r + heatCenterWeight r + heatRightWeight r = 1

tasks.input: Translate this explicit heat-equation finite-difference theorem into Lean 4: For any real diffusion number r, the explicit heat-equation weights r, 1 - 2r, and r sum to one.
tasks.target: theorem heatWeights_sum (r : Real) : heatLeftWeight r + heatCenterWeight r + heatRightWeight r = 1

tasks.input: Given the heat-equation scaffold definitions and theorem statement, complete the Lean 4 proof.
tasks.target: A proof by unfolding the three weight definitions and using ring.
